div1.entryFree: Pamper, to feed to the full: those --ed animals that rage in savage sensuality, Ado IV, 1, 61. I am your sorrow's nurse, and I will p. it with lamentations, R3 II, 2, 88. Used nonsensically by Pistol: hollow --ed jades of Asia, H4B II, 4, 178 (a parody of a passage in Marlowe's Tamburlaine: holla, you --ed jades of Asia, what, can you draw but twenty miles a day?).
